system_identity.name: DJZS Autonomous System
system_identity.description: Adversarial logic auditing and cryptographic journaling enclave.

capabilities.name: micro_zone_audit
capabilities.description: High-frequency operational ledger and sanity check. Binary risk scoring.

capabilities.name: founder_zone_audit
capabilities.description: Strategic roadmap diligence. Detects narrative drift and confirmation bias.

capabilities.name: treasury_zone_audit
capabilities.description: Exhaustive adversarial stress-test for capital deployment proposals.

capabilities.name: intelligence_brief
capabilities.description: Pre-flight intelligence analysis. Submit your current memo and historical data to receive a structured brief with 5 adversarial signals: bias patterns, narrative drift, assumption extraction, volatility stress tests, and emotional spike detection. Returns an intelligence_context string you can inject into audit requests for deeper analysis. No payment required.

expected_payload.current_memo: string (required, min 20 chars) — the strategy memo to analyze

history.audits: [{risk_score: number, primary_bias_detected: string, timestamp: string}] (optional, max 50)
